input.background: In the worked example of regression analysis (section 11.10.1) the $W^{\prime}$ test for non-Normality of the residuals gave $\mathrm{P}=0.03$.
input.question: Using the data in Table 11.6, carry out a regression of $\log _{\mathrm{e}} \mathrm{Vcf}$ on blood glucose.

output.answer:
The regression of $\log _{\mathrm{e}} V c f$ on blood glucose gives the equation

$$
\log _e \mathrm{Vcf}=0.115+0.0148 \times \text { blood glucose } .
$$

The residual SD is 0.2167.
